name: Sweet Egg Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified in your chosen recipe.
2. Grease a loaf pan according to your preferred method.
3. In a large bowl, combine the water, eggs, applesauce, and salt until well mixed.
4. Add the dry milk powder, sugar, and RapidRise yeast to the wet ingredients and stir until combined.
5. Gradually add the bread flour to the mixture, stirring constantly until a soft dough forms.
6. Transfer the dough to the prepared loaf pan and shape it according to your desired technique.
7. Place the pan in the preheated oven and bake for the time specified in your chosen recipe.
8. Remove the pan from the oven and allow the bread to cool before serving.
